def get_category(article):
    title = article.get("title", "")
    description = article.get("description", "")

    sports_terms = ["sport", "sports", "game", "match", "team", "player", "coach", "stadium", "olympics", "football", "basketball", "baseball", "soccer", "tennis", "golf", "racing"]

    science_score = sum(1 for term in science_terms if term in (title.lower() + " " + description.lower()))
    world_score = sum(1 for term in world_terms if term in (title.lower() + " " + description.lower()))

    scores = {"Sports": sports_score, "Business": business_score, "Science/Technology": science_score, "World": world_score}
    return max(scores, key=scores.get, default="World")

for article in filtered_articles:

    result = longest_description_article["title"]

else:
    print("__RESULT__: No sports articles found.")
